_meta.description: Full GPS polyline from GET /api/drives/{driveId}/route. Each RoutePoint matches the RoutePointRecord shape from data-classification.md. lat/lng are P1 (encrypted at rest). Decrypted in the store layer per NFR-3.25 before the handler serializes the response. SDK SHOULD fetch lazily (on user tap) to protect cellular bandwidth, especially on watchOS (NFR-3.36).
